metadata.og:title: i-CAT FLX 3D Cone Beam Computed Tomography (CBCT) system - Dr. Brien Hsu
metadata.og:description: Many of my colleagues were surprised to hear that I was considering upgrading to the newest state of the art CT scanner after only 5 years of having one of the most advanced 3D systems in the market- the Rayscan from Samsung. To this day none of them have a CBCT in their office. In […]
